name: Alucinate HDR
description: When Alucinate (AI VJ) mode is active, this serves as a visual 'conductor's baton' — elegant, minimal music-reactive glyphs and a living spectrogram that represent the current vibe stack. The psychedelic warp + HDR bloom provides a rich atmospheric underlayer. Mouse acts as the conductor's hand.

params.name: Atmosphere Bloom
params.description: Richness of the underlying HDR atmospheric bloom

params.name: Tone Map Exposure
params.description: How the HDR atmosphere is exposed before tone mapping

params.name: Glyph Prominence
params.description: How strongly the conductor glyphs and spectrogram overlay the atmosphere
